About_&_Key_Points:
About
IRIS Clothings Limited, incorporated in 1956, is engaged in designing, manufacturing, branding and selling garments for kids.
[1]
Iris Clothings Limited is a fast-growing readymade garment company and is engaged in designing, manufacturing, branding and selling garments for kids wear under the brand name DOREME in India. It produces a broad range of unique apparels for infants, toddlers and junior boys and girls.
Key Points
Business Profile
[1]
Founded in 1956, Iris Clothings Limited is a kids' apparel company that designs, manufactures, and markets ready-made garments under the
"DOREME"
brand. Catering to infants, toddlers, and junior boys and girls, they offer affordable, high-quality indoor and outdoor clothing for domestic and international markets.
